3084690.name: MAJOR ARCANA
3084690.description:
MAJOR ARCANA - is a roguelike deckbuilder in which the main hero Vex tries to reach Death to bring him back to Life and save the world from chaos. Or maybe Vex has her own plans for Death?

Long time ago, Life and Death had a huge argue. And then, Death left these lands. No living creature could die anymore. And the world plunged into chaos. Gnolls, goblins, orcs and bandits were blown away by the possibilities of the new world - everyone began to rob and kill each other, and then - be reborn again.

Druid of the spore circle Vex - set off on her long journey to find Death and bring him back to Life. So that together they can regain control of the MAJOR ARCANA.

More than 150 character cards!

More than 50 artifacts!

More than 100 enemy cards and 30 different locations!

Try to find Death where Life itself lost it...
